entry.title: HTML
entry.content:
Status Code

  • 1xx Informational
  • 2xx Success
  • 3xx Redirection
  • 4xx Client Error

  • 5xx Server Error

  • 301 Moved Permanently

  • 302 Found
  • 304 Not Modified
  • 403 Forbidden

DOCTYPE

DTD reference: Document Type Definition

  • HTML5: <!DOCTYPE html>

  • HTML 4.01: <!DOCTYPE HTML PUBLIC "-//W3C//DTD HTML 4.01//EN" "http://www.w3.org/TR/html4/strict.dtd"> <!DOCTYPE HTML PUBLIC "-//W3C//DTD HTML 4.01 Transitional//EN" "http://www.w3.org/TR/html4/loose.dtd"> <!DOCTYPE HTML PUBLIC "-//W3C//DTD HTML 4.01 Frameset//EN" "http://www.w3.org/TR/html4/frameset.dtd">

Contnt-Type

  • application/x-www-form-urlencoded
POST http://www.example.com HTTP/1.1
Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded;charset=utf-8

title=test&sub%5B%5D=1&sub%5B%5D=2&sub%5B%5D=3
  • multipart/form-data
POST http://www.example.com HTTP/1.1
Content-Type:multipart/form-data; boundary=----WebKitFormBoundaryrGKCBY7qhFd3TrwA

------WebKitFormBoundaryrGKCBY7qhFd3TrwA
Content-Disposition: form-data; name="text"

title
------WebKitFormBoundaryrGKCBY7qhFd3TrwA
Content-Disposition: form-data; name="file"; filename="chrome.png"
Content-Type: image/png

PNG ... content of chrome.png ...
------WebKitFormBoundaryrGKCBY7qhFd3TrwA--
  • application/json
POST http://www.example.com HTTP/1.1 
Content-Type: application/json;charset=utf-8

{"title":"test","sub":[1,2,3]}
  • text/xml
POST http://www.example.com HTTP/1.1 
Content-Type: text/xml

<?xml version="1.0"?>
<methodCall>
    <methodName>examples.getStateName</methodName>
    <params>
        <param>
            <value><i4>41</i4></value>
        </param>
    </params>
</methodCall>

XML CDATA

SVG: Scalable Vector Graphics

"\x3C/script>"
"<"+"/script>"
"<\/script>"

entity reference: * &lt: < * &gt: > * &amp(ampersand = and): & * &apos(apostrophe): ‘ * &quot: "

<message>if salary < 1000 then</message>

CDATA: Unparsed Character Data.

<![CDATA[
function matchwo(a,b) {
    if (a < b && a < 0) then {
        return 1;
    }
}
]]>

a

  • An unvisited link is underlined and blue
  • A visited link is underlined and purple

  • An active link is underlined and red

  • href: Specifies the URL of the page the link goes to

  • rel: Specifies the relationship between the current document and the linked document
  • target: Specifies where to open the linked document(blank, self, parent, top)

audio

We can just use the audio tag in HTML5 to play a piece of music like this:

<audio controls="controls" autobuffer="autobuffer" autoplay="autoplay">
    <source src="data:audio/wav;base64,{ { audioBase64 } }" />
</audio>

br

  • HTML: <br>
  • XHTML: <br />

div

  • block level element: <h1>, <p>, <ul>(unordered list), <table>, <div>(division)
  • inline element: <b>(bold), <td>(table data), <a>(anchor), <img>, <span>

dl

  • dl: description lists
  • dd: describes
  • dt: term

```

Coffee
- black hot drink
Milk
- white cold drink

## img

### crossOrigin

* anonymous: A cross-origin request is performed. But no credential is sent 
* use-credentials: A cross-origin request performed with credential is sent

### alt

* The text should describe the image if the image contains information
* The text should explain where the link goes if the image is inside an `<a>` element
* Use `alt=""` if the image is only for decoration

## link

* href: Specifies the location of the linked document
* media: Specifies on what device the linked document will be displayed
* rel: Required. Specifies the relationship between the current document and the linked document
* type: Specifies the media type of the linked document

## meta

The following tags describe metadata: `<title>`, `<style>`, `<meta>`, `<link>`, `<script>`, and `<base>`.

Meta elements are typically used to specify page description, keywords, author of the document, last modified, and other metadata.

* HTML5:

```

  • HTML 4.01: <meta http-equiv="content-type" content="text/html; charset=UTF-8">

Refresh document every 30 seconds: <meta http-equiv="refresh" content="30">

kbd

keyboard input.

strong

  • <h1> to <h6>: headings
  • <em>: emphasized text
  • <strong>: important text
  • <mark>: marked/highlighted text

style

media

This attribute is used to specify that the style is for special devices (like iPhone), speech or print media.

  • all: Default. Suitable for all devices
  • aural: Speech synthesizers
  • braille: Braille feedback devices
  • handheld: Handheld devices (small screen, limited bandwidth)
  • projection: Projectors
  • print: Print preview mode/printed pages
  • screen: Computer screens
  • tty: Teletypes and similar media using a fixed-pitch character grid
  • tv: Television type devices (low resolution, limited scroll ability)

hidden

object.style.overflow="visible|hidden|scroll|auto|initial|inherit"
  • visible: Content is NOT clipped and may be shown outside the element box
  • hidden: Content outside the element box is not shown
  • scroll: Scroll bars are added, and content is clipped when necessary
  • auto: Content is clipped and scroll bars are added when necessary
  • initial: Sets this property to its default value
  • inherit: Inherits this property from its parent element## post
<method> <request-URL> <version>
<headers>

<entity-body>

table

  • <tr>: table rows
  • <th>: table headings
  • <td>: table data

srcsec

<img src="image-src.png" srcset="image-1x.png 1x, image-2x.png 2x,
                                 image-3x.png 3x, image-4x.png 4x">

asp

asp: Active Server Pages. ASP runs only on Windows.

  • Request
<%
Response.Write "Welcome " & Server.HTMLEncode(Request.QueryString("name")) & "!"
%>
  • Response
<%
If Len(Request.QueryString("name")) > 0 Then
     Response.Cookies("name") = Request.QueryString("name") 
End If

Response.Write "Welcome " & Server.HTMLEncode(Response.Cookies("name")) & "!"
%>
  • Server
<%
Dim oAdoCon, oAdoRec, oAdoStm, oCdoCon, oCdoMsg, oSciDic, oSciFsm, oMswAdr

Set oAdoCon = Server.CreateObject("ADODB.Connection")
Set oAdoRec = Server.CreateObject("ADODB.Recordset")
Set oAdoStm = Server.CreateObject("ADODB.Stream")
Set oCdoCon = Server.CreateObject("CDO.Configuration")
Set oCdoMsg = Server.CreateObject("CDO.Message")
Set oSciDic = Server.CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")
Set oSciFsm = Server.CreateObject("Scripting.FileSystemObject")
Set oMswAdr = Server.CreateObject("MSWC.AdRotator")
%>
  • Application
<%
Application("Ali") = "My ASP Application"
Response.Write "Welcome to " & Server.HTMLEncode(Application("Ali")) & "!"
%>
  • Session
<%
If Len(Request.QueryString("name")) > 0 Then
     Session("name") = Request.QueryString("name") 
End If

Response.Write "Welcome " & Server.HTMLEncode(Session("name")) & "!"
%>
  • Error
<%
On Error Resume Next

Response.Write 1 / 0 ' Division by zero

If Err.Number <> 0 Then
     Response.Write "Error Code: " & Server.HTMLEncode(Err.Number) & "<br />"
     Response.Write "Error Source: " & Server.HTMLEncode(Err.Source) & "<br />"
     Response.Write "Error Description: " & Server.HTMLEncode(Err.Description) & "<br />"
     Err.Clear 
End If 
%>
